summary: AI engineer with hands-on experience building and deploying production LLM systems, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and evaluation frameworks across NLP and computer vision domains. Comfortable bridging research and engineering from prototype to user-facing product, with a track record of shipping full-stack AI systems on cloud infrastructure. Drawn to high-stakes applications where reliability, accuracy, and explainability are non-negotiable.

skills.ml: LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o), Prompt Engineering, RAG, LangChain, DistilBERT, XGBoost, HuggingFace, YOLO, SHAP, Captum (XAI), Deepgram, OpenAI Embeddings, Pinecone, NLP, Evaluation Frameworks
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, Railway, Supabase (PostgreSQL), GitHub Actions CI/CD, GCP, Vercel, FastAPI, Express

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data, demonstrating rigorous model evaluation practices.

Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Designed a multi-turn conversational AI engine with dynamic context injection: the LLM receives each candidate's parsed resume before the session and generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time, demonstrating prompt engineering and LLM orchestration in a production setting.

Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) and a post-interview evaluation system scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output, showing end-to-end AI feature development from data ingestion to structured output.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6, achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn; deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row-Level Security, Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built a production retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings, directly demonstrating the search and retrieval foundation this role requires.

Implemented an LLM-based query intent classifier and result re-ranker by source authority, plus multi-turn conversation support via LangChain chat-history condensing, both measurably reducing off-topic responses.

Maintained 35+ pytest unit tests and a 55-question domain evaluation set; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Developed a rigorous evaluation framework comparing four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI (XAI), directly supporting trustworthiness and fairness goals.

Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.
Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains; deployed as a publicly accessible machine learning inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
